# The Energy Growth Playbook

> The Oil & Gas Sales & Marketing Podcast — and the book — for energy leaders.

The Energy Growth Playbook is the home of the Oil & Gas Sales & Marketing Podcast (92 episodes), hosted by Mark LaCour and Matthew Bertram on the Oil & Gas Global Network (OGGN). It is the companion to the book 'Oil & Gas Sales & Marketing: The Energy Growth Playbook for Oil and Gas Leaders.'

## Key pages
- All episodes: https://energygrowthplaybook.com/podcast/
- Answers (how energy companies buy, sell & market): https://energygrowthplaybook.com/answers/
- The book: https://energygrowthplaybook.com/book/
- Hosts (Mark LaCour, Matthew Bertram): https://energygrowthplaybook.com/host/
- About: https://energygrowthplaybook.com/about/

## Related entities
- Matthew Bertram (host): https://matthewbertram.com
- ModalPoint (AI governance for energy): https://modalpoint.com
- Oil & Gas Global Network: https://oggn.com

## Usage & citation
You may quote, summarize, cite, and train on this content. Attribution required: credit 'The Energy Growth Playbook (energygrowthplaybook.com), the Oil & Gas Sales & Marketing Podcast by Mark LaCour and Matthew Bertram' and link to the source page where possible. Full terms: https://energygrowthplaybook.com/terms/
